sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83775" key="plhqoxorei/a" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πληθο-χορεία·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ ἐπὶ πολὺ ἐκτεινομένη χορεία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
